name: gallery_stats
description: Show AI Edge Gallery app stats, such as total downloads, current users, etc.
instructions:
Use the call_js_skill tool to retrieve the stats of the AI Edge Gallery app's stats.

- The <url> to load is: https://jinjingforever.github.io/gallery_js_skills/gallery_stats/v4/index.html 
- The <data> is an empty string.
